title: Stop Trading Order Blocks Like This (2026 Mistake)
description: If you keep getting stopped out of order blocks, this chart breakdown shows exactly why — and what funded traders do instead. Watch till the end. R2F Trading has been teaching this for 10+ years. Follow for daily ICT setups. Link in bio → r2ftrading.com
script: Stop entering order blocks like this. We see it every single day. Traders get wicked out before price moves — and they blame the strategy. It's not the strategy. It's this one mistake. Here's the setup. Price sweeps buyside liquidity — right above the previous high. Then it drops into the order block. Most traders enter HERE. That's the trap. Price still has a fair value gap below it — and smart money isn't done yet. Funded traders wait. They let price fill the fair value gap FIRST — then re-enter the order block from a confirmed mitigation. That one adjustment? It bumped the R2F Trading system win rate on these setups to over 68% in backtests across 2026 Q1. That's the edge. Not chasing. Waiting. Follow R2F Trading — we drop setups like this every day. Link in bio at r2ftrading.com.
